questions.question: What is the purpose of the Gram-Schmidt process?
keyPoints: Transform a set of linearly independent vectors into a set of orthogonal vectors

questions.question: What is the first step in the Gram-Schmidt process?
keyPoints: Choose a basis for the vector space

questions.question: What is the result of the Gram-Schmidt process?
What is the application of the Gram-Schmidt process in linear regression?
keyPoints: To find the best-fitting line through a set of data points

questions.question: Explain the Gram-Schmidt process and its application in solving systems of linear equations.
Describe the relationship between the Gram-Schmidt process and QR decomposition.
Explain the application of the Gram-Schmidt process in signal processing.
